data.title: Remove deprecated 'color' field from all House entries + HouseBanner fallback

data.body:
VERDICT: PASS

Reviewed cold: read plan, diff (master...HEAD), HouseBanner.tsx + houses.ts in full, AvatarBadge/Navbar diffs (empty), PRD.

Diff: 3 files, +6/-24 — matches impl report.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA (all pass):
1. grep 'house.color|h.color' src/: 0 hits.
2. grep 'color: "#' src/data/houses.ts: 0 hits.
3. grep 'color: string' src/data/houses.ts: 0 hits.
4. grep 'getBannerPair' src/: 0 hits.
5. grep 'getBannerPair' DESIGN.md: 0 hits (impl bonus cleanup).
6. pnpm tsc --noEmit: clean (exit 0).
7. pnpm build: clean (3.60s, identical chunk profile).
8. pnpm test: 143 passed / 4 failed = baseline match. 4 failures are pre-existing in footer.test, navigation.test mobile abbreviation, neighborhood.test layout — none touch HouseBanner/houses.ts/palette.
9. design.md lint: 0 errors, 27 warnings, 1 info. At cap, meets criterion.
10. DESIGN.md Accepted divergences: exactly 1 numbered item (cream-math precision). Old item #2 (lab color drift) correctly removed.
11. Behavior preservation verified logically:
    - Pre: bgColor = pair?.bg ?? house.color; pair always resolves (HOUSES.find always succeeds for a valid House.id) so pair?.bg = palette.light. Fallback was dead.
    - Post: bgColor = house.palette.light. Identical value, zero pixel change.
    - Pre: letterColor = pair?.letter ?? (...); pair?.letter = palette.deep, fallback dead.
    - Post: letterColor = house.palette.deep. Identical value.
12. Unchanged files verified: AvatarBadge (doesn't exist in tree — removed in prior task, not regression), Navbar (already uses houseColor() helper that reads palette directly — empty diff).

BONUS DESIGN.md EDITS: The impl agent updated two additional DESIGN.md references to getBannerPair (lines ~293 and ~340) that the plan did not enumerate but that would have been left dangling. Both are correct, necessary, in-scope cleanup (criterion #5 explicitly expected this). Not overreach.

HouseBanner.tsx structure clean: HOUSES import removed; getBannerPair helper + its comment removed; 3-line replacement reads naturally (87-89); no orphan vars; isDark helper still used for textColor.

houses.ts: all 6 entries flow route -> palette directly; interface JSDoc trimmed cleanly (route -> palette JSDoc).

PRD cross-check: FRAC-22 references 'house colors' as a concept (per-house accents), no requirement to preserve a TypeScript 'color' field. Migration to palette (FRAC-24) + cleanup (FRAC-50) align with PRD intent. No discrepancy.

No concerns. Ready to merge.
